meetings.title: Discovery Call

minutes.text: Healthcare app for patient records with doctor login and AI analytics.
Decision: We will use Google OAuth and Microsoft OAuth. Doctors are read-only. Must follow HIPAA and FHIR.

analysis_history.input_text:
Healthcare app for patient records with doctor login and AI analytics.
PM: We need secure access and role based controls.
Doctor: I need to view and maybe update records quickly.

questions: Who is the primary actor performing this requirement?
What exact action should be performed?
What system component or entity is affected by this action?
Which authentication methods should be supported (password, OAuth, SSO, MFA)?
How should session timeout, refresh, and logout invalidation be handled?
What should happen after repeated failed login attempts (lockout, cooldown, alerts)?
What account recovery flow is required (email OTP, SMS OTP, reset link)?
What specific patient information will be displayed?
Which OAuth providers will be supported?
What permissions are assigned to user, doctor, and admin roles?
What healthcare data privacy standards must be followed?
What AI analytics capabilities are required?
Which clinical workflows are in scope for this release?
What healthcare interoperability standards should be supported (FHIR/HL7)?
What audit trail depth is required for patient data changes?

meetings.title: meeting 1

minutes.text: Speaker 1: Listen up. We have to cut this company's budget in half and we are not leaving this room until we. We do it. Is that clear? Is that clear? Good. I need your best ideas, and I need them now. Shelly. Well, I've looked at the budget. Frankly, I think we're spending way too much transportation. Transportation, huh? Daniel, What do you think, Sir? Our online division is hemorrhaging money. I say we lose it. OK, Peter, I gotta go with Dan here. Derek, I'd lose tech support. OK, Red downsize researcher. Water guy, I don't work here, right? I agree with what Derek said. Mountain Joe.

Speaker 1: Early today, today's meeting is just about discussing how we are going to plan out our project Boxify. OK, yes, we'll now find out.
Speaker 2: What your meeting plan is about.
Speaker 3: So basically, we will go through the DNC cycle or firstly we will see what are the requirements that our project is going to be in process. And now I want to build a smart card with an intelligent ecommerce platform designed for middle-size retailers.
Speaker 3: The system allows customers to browse products, add them to cart a complete purchases using multiple payment methods.
Speaker 4: The platform supports Near.
Speaker 2: Account order history.
Speaker 5: Inventory tracking and all.
Speaker 2: Laptop.
